title: St. Mary's School — Office Staff Weekly Meeting
summary: Admission enquiries for the new academic year are up 22% over last year; 340 application forms have been issued so far.
Term-fee reminders went out to 68 families; Accounts expects most payments to clear before the 15 July deadline.
The auditorium projector and two classroom fans need repair before the parent orientation on 24 July.
Front desk reported repeated parent queries about the new bus routes; a printed FAQ sheet was proposed and approved.

action_items.task: Compile the admissions enquiry report and share it with the principal
Send second fee reminder to families with pending payments
Get repair quotes for the auditorium projector and classroom fans
Draft the bus-route FAQ sheet for the front desk and reception notice board

decisions: Parent orientation confirmed for 24 July 2026 in the main auditorium.
A one-page bus-route FAQ will be printed and kept at the front desk.
Office will move to the new visitor sign-in register from 14 July 2026.
